summary: Reviewed and safely synced the DinoBrain data repository. Pushed the two existing ahead commits after inspecting their task-summary scope and passing data safety hooks, then committed and pushed one additional safe 60_Operations task-summary file. Left the remaining large dirty set uncommitted because it is candidate/review/conditional operational data rather than reviewed durable knowledge.
decisions: Pushed existing data commits b87df23 and 741cce3 because they only contained 60_Operations task summaries and behavior-rule index timestamp updates.
Committed and pushed 28b6a05 for the single remaining safe 60_Operations task summary.
Did not commit the remaining dirty candidate/review/conditional operational artifacts because public-data safety remains degraded with 1356 warnings and those records need review or policy cleanup.
Kept raw/operational traces and live prompt context out of broad public sync.
next_steps: Build a dedicated review-queue burn-down flow before promoting the 639 candidate and 639 review queue records.
Decide whether .dino state/task/trace/context-pack artifacts should be pruned, ignored, or synced through a scoped operational archive policy.
Address public-data safety warnings for machine-local path markers and unclassified tracked paths.
search_queries: public data safety hook data sync
